title: Orbital
description: This mod add orbital calls to minecraft
body:
# **Orbital**

**Orbital is a Minecraft addon that introduces a powerful orbital beam strike that can be called using a phone device.**

With this system, players can deploy advanced orbital technology directly from orbit. Using the phone, you can target a location and call down a devastating energy beam from space, creating a dramatic and destructive impact.

The goal of Orbital is to bring a high-tech orbital weapon system into Minecraft in a simple and immersive way.

currentyle only avaible the orbital beam via the use of the phone on the combat tab
